text:
Created attachment 169809
patch for updating security/p5-openxpki

- Update of security/p5-openxpki* 1.8.0 --> 1.9.0
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/openxpki/commits/master

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warnings.

- Tested with poudriere at 11.0-CURRENT-amd64,
perl5-5.20, and openssl from ports.
